title: Anatomy of a Line Plot in R
description: A visual breakdown of the core components and code structure required to build a line plot using ggplot2 in R.
relationships: The Data Frame provides the foundational data for the plot. The ggplot() function initializes the plot object using this data. The geom_line() layer is added to draw the connecting lines. The labs() function is used to add human-readable labels. Finally, theme() functions are applied to adjust the plot's non-data appearance.
